confirm.title: Confirm Pivot Firmware
confirm.description:
Make sure **{device_name}** is running the Pivot firmware.

Enter the `device_suffix` you set in your firmware YAML. This must be unique across all your Pivot devices. It determines your entity IDs and cannot be changed without reflashing the firmware.

data.firmware_confirmed: I have flashed the Pivot firmware

data_description.device_suffix: Must match `device_suffix` in your firmware YAML exactly, e.g. `lounge` or `ha_voice_1`

options.title: Settings
options.description: Choose how Pivot handles the scripts and automations it may need.

data_description.management_mode:
Automatic setup: Recommended. Pivot creates and manages the scripts and automations it needs for you. This is the easiest option and works out of the box with your assigned bank entities.

Blueprint setup: Pivot adds blueprint files to your Home Assistant configuration. You then create the automations and script yourself from those blueprints in the Home Assistant UI.

Manual setup: Pivot does not create any files for you. You create your own scripts and automations from scratch using Pivot's events and entities. Advanced users only.

Please note: If you switch away from Automatic setup after setting it up initially, Pivot may remove any scripts and automations it created for you.

Choosing Automatic setup does not lock you into Pivot's built-in automations. You can still create your own custom automations at any time. For example, if you leave a bank unassigned, the automatically created Pivot script has nothing to control, so your own automation can handle it instead.
data_description.announcements: When turned on, Pivot says the current bank and mode when you switch banks or change control mode.
data_description.tts_entity: Choose the service that creates the spoken announcement.
data_description.media_player_entity: Choose the media player that will play the announcement.

abort.no_esphome_devices: No ESPHome devices found. Add your VPE in the ESPHome integration first.
abort.suffix_collision: Another Pivot entry already uses this device suffix.

error.cannot_read_device_name: Could not read ESPHome device name.
error.must_confirm_firmware: You must confirm the firmware is flashed before continuing.
error.suffix_collision: This device suffix is already in use by another Pivot device.
error.esphome_name_required: Please enter the ESPHome device name.

mode_warning.title: Changing setup mode
mode_warning.description:
You are switching away from **Automatic** setup.

Pivot will remove the scripts and automations it created for you. You will need to set up your own, or use blueprints.

Tick the box below to confirm.

data.confirm_mode_change: I understand — remove Pivot-managed files and switch mode

banks.title: Bank Entity Assignment
banks.description:
Assign a Home Assistant entity to each bank. All banks are optional — leave any empty to skip it.

**How it works:** in Control Mode, turn the knob to adjust the entity (brightness, volume, fan speed, etc.) and press the button to toggle it on/off.

**Scenes & scripts** activate on button press only — the knob does nothing for those.

Supported entities: lights, switches, fans, covers, climate, media players, scenes, scripts.
